title: Follow live: Irankunda, Metcalfe steer Australia to a historic 2-0 win against Türkiye
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(jsonld:articleBody) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
The half-time whistle is blown and Australia lead 1-0.

Here's the reaction at Melbourne's Federation Sqaure after Irankunda's 27th minute goal.
And enjoy the goal from Irankunda again, who has become the Socceroos youngest ever World Cup goal scorer at just 20 years of age.
It was a great half for Australia, with Popovic's calls to start Irankunda and Beach having paid off so far, the latter making a critical save.

Türkiye leads possession but has been unable to unpick Australia's defence.
